task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Magento admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin dashboard is visible in the browser, indicating successful login using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Product Attributes section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product Attributes' grid/list page is visible (typically found under Stores > Attributes > Product).

task_completion.description: Verify the search weight for the 'sku' attribute is set to 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute edit page for 'sku' is open (specifically the 'Storefront Properties' section), and the 'Search Weight' field contains the value '10'.

task_completion.description: Verify the search weight for the 'name' attribute is set to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute edit page for 'name' (Product Name) is open (specifically the 'Storefront Properties' section), and the 'Search Weight' field contains the value '5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the search weight for the 'description' attribute is set to 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute edit page for 'description' is open (specifically the 'Storefront Properties' section), and the 'Search Weight' field contains the value '1'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the Magento Admin UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating the Magento admin panel.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database manipulation to change the weights.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows, MySQL clients, or script editors used to execute SQL queries or Magento CLI commands to update the attributes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements match the genuine Magento 2 admin interface, rather than a text editor, mock-up, or copy-pasted text of the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Magento 2 product attribute search weights. The valid range for search weights in Magento is 1-10. Expected values: SKU = 10, Product Name = 5, Description = 1. These settings are located in the Magento Admin panel under Stores > Attributes > Product, within the 'Storefront Properties' tab of each specific attribute.
